issue_title: Fix erroneous diffing w/ growing list
issue_body_preview: Resolves #4973 When we diff a list of children and in the new list an item gets added we will diff the newly added item against the oldVNode of its previous sibling due to the global nature of oldVNode Test failure without the children diff:
test_description_zh: 在一个动态列表中，初始渲染若干项后，向列表末尾或中间添加新项目，观察所有列表项（包括新增项和已有项）是否正确渲染，内容和顺序是否与预期一致。
expected_result_zh: 列表在新增项目后，所有已有项保持不变，新增项正确出现在预期位置，不会出现项目内容错乱、重复、丢失或渲染异常的情况。
